I will put my final answer inside \boxed{}.

factor values (sorted): 1.898, 1.898, 1.898, 1.898
The median factor is 1.898.

Converting 8.75:
8.75 * 1.898:
8.75 * 0.008 = 0.07000
8.75 * 0.090 = 0.78750
8.75 * 0.800 = 7.00000
8.75 * 1.000 = 8.75000
0.07000 + 0.78750 = 0.85750
0.85750 + 7.00000 = 7.85750
7.85750 + 8.75000 = 16.60750
= 16.607

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{16.607}
